mapper.select:
SELECT A.id , MAX(A.api_name) AS apiName , MAX(A.api_url) AS apiUrl , MAX(A.api_method) AS apiMethod , MAX(A.api_code) AS apiCode , GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT R.role_code ORDER BY R.role_code SEPARATOR ', ') AS roleCodes FROM sys_apis A LEFT JOIN sys_role_api RA ON A.id= RA.api_id LEFT JOIN sys_roles R ON RA.role_id = R.id
WHERE 1=1
AND UPPER(A.api_name) LIKE CONCAT('%', UPPER(#{sysApiCondition.apiName, typeHandler=backend.common.handler.LikeEscapeTypeHandler}), '%')
AND UPPER(A.api_url) LIKE CONCAT('%', UPPER(#{sysApiCondition.apiUrl, typeHandler=backend.common.handler.LikeEscapeTypeHandler}), '%')
GROUP BY A.id

SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM sys_apis A INNER JOIN sys_role_api RA ON A.id = RA.api_id INNER JOIN sys_roles R ON RA.role_id = R.id WHERE A.api_url = #{apiUrl} AND A.api_method = #{httpMethodCode} AND R.role_code IN
#{role}
